nasb.text: And the man Micah had a shrine and he made an ephod and household idols and consecrated one of his sons, that he might become his priest.

esv.text: And the man Micah had a shrine, and he made an ephod and household gods, and ordained one of his sons, who became his priest.

cnv.text: 米迦這人有一間神廟，又製造以弗得和家中的神像，並且立了他的一個兒子作祭司。

ccb.text: 米迦有一个神庙，他制造了一件以弗得和一些家庭神像，并指派他的一个儿子做祭司。
